criterion_description: Synthetic quality gates remain green on the accepted generator version.
acceptance_threshold: no fail rows and no unresolved warning rows

criterion_description: Predeclared holdout generator profiles are structurally available.
acceptance_threshold: holdout profiles cover required quarter/feed scenarios

criterion_description: Disconnect/stressed feed imperfections are present and used in reruns.
acceptance_threshold: feed-imperfection profiles are rerun through full lifecycle execution

criterion_description: Candidate strategies are rerun on holdout-generator profiles.
acceptance_threshold: strategy P&L/signal/risk reruns exist on Q-B/Q-C holdout profiles

criterion_description: Holdout reruns include stressed retail, partial-fill and pessimistic execution assumptions.
acceptance_threshold: pessimistic execution rerun passes or blocks promotion
negative controls show edge does not depend on synthetic artifacts
